name: Weaviate Vector Database
description: An open-source vector database that stores data objects and performs semantic similarity searches, powering AI applications, RAG pipelines and recommendation engines with fast approximate nearest-neighbor queries.

aws.parity: Weaviate's REST and gRPC query APIs perform the same embedding-based similarity search that OpenSearch's k-NN index provides — the same vector search logic works on both.
aws.deploy: Create an OpenSearch domain with the k-NN plugin enabled and migrate your index schemas to OpenSearch index mappings.

variables.label: HTTP Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Weaviate REST API and web console.

variables.label: gRPC Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine for the Weaviate gRPC API (used by v4 clients).
